plugins.name: anamnese-core
plugins.description: Cloud-persistent memory and self-learning for AI. Automatically captures facts, decisions, tasks, goals, and knowledge -- synced across Claude Code, ChatGPT, Cursor, and all your devices. Learns from your corrections to get better over time.

plugins.name: anamnese-assistant
plugins.description: Life and productivity skills powered by Anamnese memory. Goal planning with SMART framework, daily time-blocking with Eisenhower prioritization, career growth tracking, wellness habits, financial awareness, and knowledge management. Integrates with Google Calendar, Gmail, Slack, Notion, Linear, and more.
